operations.title: Search Issue Context
operations.summary: Search bounded Linear issues, projects, and cycles without exposing raw workspace tools.

inputs.name: team_key
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for team_key when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: query
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for query when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for limit when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded Linear provider options such as selected fields or pagination. Must not bypass team scope, approval, or export policy.
inputs.clarification_hint: Do not ask for backend_options unless the user explicitly needs provider-specific controls.

operations.title: Prepare Issue

inputs.name: team_key
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for team_key when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: title
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for title when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: description
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for description when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: project_id
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for project_id when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: labels
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for labels when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded Linear provider options such as selected fields or pagination. Must not bypass team scope, approval, or export policy.
inputs.clarification_hint: Do not ask for backend_options unless the user explicitly needs provider-specific controls.

operations.title: Prepare Issue Comment
operations.summary: Prepare a Linear issue comment from review or incident context without posting it.

inputs.name: issue_id
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for issue_id when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: comment_purpose
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for comment_purpose when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: context
inputs.summary: Bounded context for the proposed comment.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for context when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded Linear provider options such as selected fields or pagination. Must not bypass team scope, approval, or export policy.
inputs.clarification_hint: Do not ask for backend_options unless the user explicitly needs provider-specific controls.
